betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Tanks and Barrels§f store fluids for industrial operations.

§eTypes:§f
• §bFluid Tanks§f - General liquid storage
• §bBarrels§f - Compact item storage
• §bPressurized Tanks§f - Gas storage

§eSpecial Storage:§f
• §bHeavy Magnetic Storage Tank§f - Antimatter (required!)
• §bNuclear Waste Barrels§f - Radioactive waste

§aTip:§f Always use appropriate container type for your fluid.
